scripts.start: npm run optimize-videos:local && cross-env NODE_ENV=local concurrently "npx tailwindcss -i ./src/css/styles.css -o ./dist/css/bundle.css --watch --content=./src/**/*.html --content=./src/**/*.njk --content=./src/**/*.js" "cross-env NODE_ENV=local eleventy --serve"
scripts.build:local: npm run optimize-videos:local && cross-env NODE_ENV=local npx tailwindcss -i ./src/css/styles.css -o ./dist/css/bundle.css --minify --content=./src/**/*.html --content=./src/**/*.njk --content=./src/**/*.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=local eleventy
scripts.build:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run optimize-videos:dev && npx tailwindcss -i ./src/css/styles.css -o ./dist-dev/css/bundle.css --minify --content=./src/**/*.html --content=./src/**/*.njk --content=./src/**/*.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=development eleventy
scripts.build:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run optimize-videos:prod && npx tailwindcss -i ./src/css/styles.css -o ./dist-prod/css/bundle.css --minify --content=./src/**/*.html --content=./src/**/*.njk --content=./src/**/*.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=production eleventy
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build:dev && npm run lint && node scripts/deploy.js dev
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:prod && npm run lint && node scripts/deploy.js prod
